project_type: Full-stack photo tagging app - Python FastAPI backend + Next.js frontend
build_system: uv for Python backend, pnpm for Next.js frontend
test_framework: pytest for backend, Next.js build for frontend
verification_instructions: 1. Start backend: cd /projects/sandbox/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000. 2. Open test page in browser at http://localhost:8000/test. 3. Upload an image and verify tags appear.
setup_instructions: Backend deps already installed via uv. No additional setup needed.
contribution_requirements: None specific for this test page.
key_patterns: Backend uses FastAPI with async endpoints, SQLAlchemy async sessions, Pydantic v2 schemas. API returns JSON with photo data including tags array. Each tag has category (WHO/FACES/WHAT/WHERE), value, and confidence. Photos served as static files from /uploads/ path.
directory_structure: backend/app/ - FastAPI app with routes, services, ML pipeline. frontend/ - Next.js app. The new test page will be a standalone HTML file served by the backend.
